narrative:
Azzedine Ounahi is a central midfielder for Morocco, establishing himself as a key player. His overall rating of 7.22/10 places him in the top 2% of central midfields at this tournament. This high rating reflects a blend of his club form over the last two seasons and his current World Cup performances.

At this World Cup, Ounahi has shown a remarkable scoring touch with 0.519 goals per 90 minutes, significantly outperforming his 0.073 expected goals per 90 minutes. He demonstrates strong creative output, delivering 2.075 key passes per 90 minutes. However, his defensive contributions are minimal, evident by just 0.259 tackles per 90 minutes.

Ounahi clearly operates in an advanced or box-to-box role for Morocco, contributing significantly to their attack. Scouts should continue to observe his exceptional finishing and consistent creative play in the final third. Attention should also be paid to how his team covers his low defensive metrics in crucial upcoming matches.
